topic: Compare the public Xanther Context Engine (XCE) MCP surface in external/ against our local code_graph (.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/code_graph/) and skill_advisor (.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/skill_advisor/) subsystems. Identify adoption candidates by extracting findings, methods, logic, and architectural patterns from XCE's 5 tool primitives (xce_get_context, xce_architecture_context, xce_search, xce_trace, xce_impact_analysis), HLD/LLD layered abstractions, and context-first steering pattern. Reverse-engineer the closed-source PRAT (Persistent Recursive Abstract Tree) algorithm from public clues (name decomposition, benchmark numbers, tool API shape) and map plausible pipeline stages to our local files. Produce: (1) RQ-keyed research.md synthesis, (2) findings.md adoption matrix with ADOPT / ADAPT / DEFER / SKIP verdicts and file:line citations, (3) sub-packet-proposals.md with 1-4 candidate downstream packets, (4) resource-map.md path ledger. Every claim about XCE must cite external/; every claim about local code must cite mcp_server/. Research-only packet — no source modifications.

resolution: --pure required because DeepSeek API rejects MCP tool names with regex /^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$/. Returning to deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro primary with --pure.

topic: Cross-validate the 5-phase XCE adoption implementation plans (001-005) inside .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/027-xce-research-based-refinement/. Find implementation risks, schema gaps, cross-phase integration concerns, edge cases, and alternative approaches NOT surfaced in the first deepseek-v4-pro research pass. Produce per-phase amendment proposals in pt-02/sub-packet-amendments.md. Each iteration focuses on one of 10 implementation-RQs (IRQ1-IRQ10).
Pt-03: XCE teaching opportunities BEYOND code-graph for mcp-coco-index AND system-spec-kit memory backend / causal graph

keyFinding: Renderer-side uncertainty re-check at render.ts:129-138 is the minimal safe guard (~8 LOC): extract uncertaintyOk and apply to both passes_threshold and numeric branches, preserving the confidenceOnly escape hatch.

File-level SHA-256 hashing and parent/chunk row shape exist; memoization_records, dependency_edges, canonical-fingerprint.ts, memo.ts, and all four new chunk-metadata columns are entirely absent — spec-003 scope is accurate for those missing primitives and should reuse existing hash infrastructure where it overlaps.

Commit d232da4ee (012-causal-graph-channel-routing) touched only routing-telemetry and entity-density-cache paths — all three causal-edge hard-delete call sites remain tombstone-free and no audit infrastructure for edge deletions exists anywhere in mcp_server/

Final synthesis resolves all 5 pt-04 open questions, consolidates amended phase verdicts, and surfaces 8 critical implementation-blocking findings (auto-provenance cap bypass, retention sweep tier-blindness, passes_threshold render bypass, semantic trigger latency budget, RerankClient boundary, weighted hit count for decay, edge floor over-breadth, memory curator budget split).

008-feedback-reducers five-child decomposition already implements the pt-04 P0-split via sibling 002-feedback-p0-correctness; amendments needed for relation-coverage.ts and stage4-filter.ts reuse in 003 and 004.

Hybrid lexical+semantic shape: lexical short-circuit at trigger-matcher.ts:855, async semantic fallback via memory_trigger_embeddings derived table, spec-folder-hierarchy.ts as PRAT structural prior for ancestor/sibling scope expansion.
002 must ship first as P0 safety blocker; 003+004 should merge-sprint; total roadmap is 10 ranked deliverables with LOC 1600-2560 across phases 002-008

manual.depends_on/supersedes/related_to already promoted via packetReferencesToCausalLinks but parent_id and children_ids are not promoted at all — the highest-determinism structural edges are the current gap

012 causal-routing commit added two inline invalidateEntityDensityCache() callsites in memory-save.ts:2637 and memory-bulk-delete.ts:151,258, plus clearDegreeCache()+clearRelatedCache() in mutation-hooks.ts:70-71,85 — all four belong in phase 006 statediff subscriber scope; memory-bulk-delete.ts and mutation-feedback.ts are missing from the Files to Change table and must be added.
Phases 002, 003, and 007-shadow can start now; 004 waits on 003, 005 waits on 004, 006 waits on 003+005, and 008 waits on 002 plus 028 evidence for live reducer tuning.

topic: Continuation revalidation of 027 XCE-derived Spec Kit refinement against external/xce-mcp, current system-spec-kit implementation, and existing 027 plans; 21 targeted iterations.

lineage.reason: Continuation artifacts 040-060 were consolidated into the root research folder; source archive retained.

focus: State hygiene: validate old vs new research state and stale reducer outputs before official resume
noveltyJustification: Four findings were new continuation diagnostics and one was partially known from the restart lineage note.

focus: Path/root drift: reconcile specs roots, command names, and current 027 implementation paths
noveltyJustification: The command-name contradiction and 2026-06-04 renumbering make most findings new blockers for official resume.

focus: XCE signal/noise: classify portable local ideas versus SaaS, marketing, and PRAT claims
noveltyJustification: Three portable ideas and three non-portable boundaries were freshly reclassified from the local XCE corpus.
5 of 6 findings directly revalidated current templates/rules/constitutional files; T1 deferral was partially known but confirmed against current validation surfaces.
All 6 findings were current-code confirmations of the three P0 safety gaps plus path/schema context.
All 6 findings were current-code confirmations distinguishing existing coarse incremental/chunk infrastructure from missing 003 memo/DAG/fingerprint requirements.
Prior finding 004 was confirmed, with new/clarified surfaces for stale memory-index cleanup, manual unlink, actual memory-crud-delete filename, and CLI bulk-delete.
Prior finding 005 was confirmed with clearer separation between already wired manual graph-metadata causal links and missing deterministic parent/child/parentChain promotion.
Prior finding 006 was confirmed, with a new explicit must-add/wrap clarification for lib/search/entity-density.ts and refreshed current line evidence for save, scan, bulk-delete, and mutation hooks.
5 of 6 findings were new implementation-drift checks; one was prior-plan confirmation.
7 of 8 findings were current-module drift checks; one confirmed the existing phase-parent plan.
5 of 7 findings were local synthesis/adaptation; two restated governance constraints needed for the tree.
5 of 6 findings were new or newly synthesized for 027, with one reinforcing known memory/code-search separation.
6 findings connected existing template, extractor, tests, and workflow emission into new 027 stale-reference and coverage gates.
6 findings synthesized raw-history preservation, reducer idempotence, corruption handling, and stale synthesis repair into an official repair model.
4 of 5 findings newly classify live command/root drift while reusing existing alias-canonicalization evidence.
3 of 5 findings newly connect XCE-style impact analysis to the local false-safe detect_changes and ownership boundary, with one live blocked-tool observation.
3 of 5 findings are newly synthesized into a phase decision while 2 reuse prior RQ-B2 evidence.
4 of 5 findings converted existing Phase 007 invariants into new operational batching, resume, and promotion gates.
5 of 6 findings translated Phase 008 and live code constraints into explicit shadow-to-live reducer gates.
2 findings were new synthesis, 1 partially new, and 2 restated packet boundaries because 040-057 artifacts were missing locally.
Mapped all 008 parent/child coco cross-references, classified each REMOVE/REWRITE, confirmed 002-coco wholly removable and the surviving 001->003/004->005 topology.
Mapped all Coco references in 002/003/004/006 and separated incidental deletion from structural rewrites without finding any in-scope requirement/AC that must vanish.
Audit largely confirmed; the useful delta is exact live provenance and the stale `description.json.parent_id`/P0 manual-triplet cleanup.
